hero.name: Mikhailo Kravchuk
hero.tagline: Junior Web Developer — Clean Code & Modern UI
hero.description: I build websites and landing pages, work with HTML, CSS, JavaScript and React. I take on straightforward tasks and learn something new with every project.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Beginner web developer with a love for clean code and good design
about.bio: I'm a junior web developer who builds websites, landing pages and simple web apps. I work with HTML, CSS, JavaScript and React, pay attention to detail and always strive to improve. I'm honest about my skill level — I take on tasks I can actually deliver well.

web.title: Websites & Landing Pages
web.description: Building clean, responsive websites and landing pages using HTML, CSS, JavaScript and React. Mobile-friendly and easy to maintain.

bots.title: Simple Telegram Bots
bots.description: Creating basic Telegram bots for notifications, form forwarding or simple automation — straightforward tasks without complex integrations.

db.title: Basic UI & Layouts
db.description: Turning designs into working interfaces. I can work with Figma mockups and implement them using modern CSS and component libraries.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of work I'm proud of

contact.title: Let's Work Together
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? I'd love to hear about it.
